code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD reed_in_the_wind[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] click reed_in_the_wind callback " Reed in the Wind

Cost: 1 mote per 2 dice Duration: Instant Type: Reflexive Minimum Dodge: 2 Minimum Essence: 1 Prerequisite Charms: None The Exalted lets Essence flow through her body, making her motions as smooth as those of reeds and willows in the wind. For each mote spent, add 2 dice to an attempt to dodge an attack that the character can anticipate coming. A character cannot gain more dice than her regular Dexterity + Dodge pool. The player must declare she is using this Charm and how much Essence she will spend on it before her character's opponent makes his attack roll. If there are an odd number of dice in the characters Dexterity + Dodge pool, the fractional mote left over after buying the last die is lost.

Errata:
Each mote spent on Reed in the Wind adds 2 dice to the character’s Dexterity + Dodge pool, not 1 die as the Charm description at one point implies. " shadow_over_water[HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] reed_in_the_wind --> shadow_over_water click shadow_over_water callback " Shadow Over Water

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Reed in the Wind

Like shadows over water, the Exalted moves with perfect, fluid grace and speed. The character may dodge a single attack that he can anticipate with his full Dexterity + Dodge pool. Characters must spend the Essence for Shadow Over Water before his opponent makes her attack roll. " seven_shadow_evasion[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] shadow_over_water --> seven_shadow_evasion click seven_shadow_evasion callback " Seven Shadow Evasion

Cost: 6 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 5
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Shadow Over Water

From Shadows Over Water to shadow itself, the character is too quick to be hit at all. The character can use this Charm to evade, without the need for a roll, any single attack that she can anticipate, even one that has an area of effect. A character must invoke Seven Shadow Evasion before her opponent makes his attack roll. " reflex_sidestep_technique[HealthTech_PatientRecords] reed_in_the_wind --> reflex_sidestep_technique click reflex_sidestep_technique callback " Reflex Sidestep Technique

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Reed in the Wind

The character's attunement to the interaction of her anima with the ambient Essence of Creation makes her preternaturally aware of her surroundings. By using this Charm, she may dodge attacks that she is not even aware of. If the character is attacked, even by an attack she does not anticipate, she may spend 2 motes of Essence to attempt to evade the attack. The character's dice pool for dodging such attacks is equal to (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine). Reflex Sidestep Technique cannot be used as part of a Combo with other Dodge Charms. Although the character does not perceive the situation until she has already dodged, the player may choose whether or not the character spends the Essence to dodge the blow. If she chooses to dodge, she must spend the Essence to do so before the attacker makes his roll. " flow_like_blood[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] reflex_sidestep_technique --> flow_like_blood seven_shadow_evasion --> flow_like_blood click flow_like_blood callback " Flow Like Blood

Cost: 5 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One scene
Type: Simple
Minimum Dodge: 5
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Reflex Sidestep Technique, Seven Shadow Evasion

The character permeates his being with Essence, becoming partly atomized. He moves with an impossible fluid grace, and those attacks that he cannot dodge often pass harmlessly through his dreamlike body. For the rest of the scene, the character may use his full Dexterity + Dodge dice pool to dodge all physical attacks, perceived or not. " subgraph Castebook Night leaping_dodge_method[HealthTech_PatientRecords] click leaping_dodge_method callback " Leaping Dodge Method

Cost: 4 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Shadow Over Water

When attacked, the Exalted makes a prodigious leap to take herself out of harms way. When making any dodge using this Charm, the character avoids the attack by leaping up to (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) x 3 yards vertically or twice this distance horizontally. The Exalt can choose the exact direction and distance of this leap, so long as it is away from her attacker. Leaping Dodge Method is explicitly permitted to be part of a Combo with any Dodge Charms, including Reflex Sidestep Technique. This Charm will break multiple attack techniques if the attacker cannot follow the dodging character. " end shadow_over_water --> leaping_dodge_method
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech系统画一个流程图，核心是HIPAA合规的数据流转。起点应该是HIPAA_Vault，作为整个安全架构的根基。
明白，把HIPAA_Vault作为根节点。那它的下游应该连接哪些模块？我注意到系统里还有LabAnalyzer和DiagnosticEngine这两个核心组件。
对，从HIPAA_Vault要分出两条线。一条先到LabAnalyzer，这是样本分析的前置步骤；另一条直接到PatientRecords，用于快速调阅患者基础信息。
LabAnalyzer分析完成后，数据流入DiagnosticEngine做深度诊断。这是关键路径。另外，PatientRecords那边也需要能到达DiagnosticEngine，形成完整的诊断闭环。
已添加：LabAnalyzer → DiagnosticEngine，以及PatientRecords → DiagnosticEngine。现在DiagnosticEngine有两个上游来源了。
还有一个重要细节：DiagnosticEngine本身要能回流到PatientRecords，因为诊断结果需要写回患者档案。这是双向的。
收到，DiagnosticEngine → PatientRecords。这样PatientRecords和DiagnosticEngine就形成了互相指向的关系。
等等，让我再检查一下。实际上PatientRecords到DiagnosticEngine应该是单向的查询关系，而DiagnosticEngine的结果回流也是单向写入。不是双向互指，是我刚才表述不清。
理解，我调整一下：保持PatientRecords → DiagnosticEngine，以及DiagnosticEngine → PatientRecords，但这两条是独立的业务流向，不是简单的双向箭头。结构上看起来是互相指向，但语义不同。
对了，还需要一个子图区域，叫"Castebook Night"，把Leaping Dodge Method相关的逻辑放进去。这个模块比较特殊，它要从Shadow Over Water那边接入。
Shadow Over Water是指LabAnalyzer吗？我需要确认映射关系。
是的，LabAnalyzer对应Shadow Over Water。所以LabAnalyzer要有一条线连到Castebook Night子图里的Leaping Dodge Method。
已创建Castebook Night子图，内部包含Leaping Dodge Method节点，并添加LabAnalyzer到该节点的连接。
最后，Leaping Dodge Method本身也是HealthTech_PatientRecords的一种实现形态，需要把子图内的这个节点标识为PatientRecords类型。

确认，Leaping Dodge Method节点类型设为HealthTech_PatientRecords。整个结构现在包含：根节点HIPAA_Vault，分支到LabAnalyzer和PatientRecords，LabAnalyzer下游到DiagnosticEngine和子图内的Leaping Dodge Method，DiagnosticEngine与PatientRecords互有流向。
完美，这就是我们要的HealthTech数据流架构。HIPAA_Vault作为安全基座，支撑起整个诊断和患者记录的闭环。
